emails.subject: Re: Flight requests?
emails.body: Re: Flight requests? I need to be in Los Angeles at about 10-10:30 am on june 5th. and we should do the colorado tickets, too, i guess. i'll call you tomorrow and we can discuss? thanks for asking. Best, Jeff Joseph Alamo 05/23/2001 06:19 PM
